column_description: project identifier that received the donation
whether donor is also a teacher
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
• f: false, it means this donor is not a teacher
• t: true, it means this donor is a teacher

column_description: amount to project, excluding optional support (tip)

value_description:
commonsense evidence:
donated amount = donation_to_project + donation_optional_support

column_description: whether optional support (tip) was included for DonorsChoose.org
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
• f: false, optional support (tip) was not included for DonorsChoose.org
• t: true, optional support (tip) was included for DonorsChoose.org

column_description: whether a portion of a donation used account credits redemption
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
• f: false, a portion of a donation didn't use account credits redemption
• t: true, a portion of a donation used account credits redemption

column_description: whether a portion of a donation included corporate sponsored gift card
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
• f: false, a portion of a donation included corporate sponsored gift card
• t: true, a portion of a donation included corporate sponsored gift card

column_name: payment included web purchased gift card
column_description: whether a portion of a donation included citizen purchased gift card (ex: friend buy a gift card for you)
whether a donation was matched 1-1 with corporate funds
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
• f: false, a donation was not matched 1-1 with corporate funds
• t: true, a donation was matched 1-1 with corporate funds

column_description: donation given via a giving / campaign page (example: Mustaches for Kids)

value_description:
commonsense evidence:
• f: false, this donation is not made for an honoree
• t: true, this donation is made for an honoree
